content: Existing LLM triage tools: k8sgpt = deterministic analyzers triage first, LLM only explains filtered findings; HolmesGPT = agentic tool-calling loop over live observability sources; academic security-log RAG systems stress 'filter before analysis' — LLMs cannot process raw log volume, so deterministic reduction (parsing, dedup, salience) precedes any LLM call. Sift's batch pipeline (deterministic reduce -> single hypothesis call) matches k8sgpt/RAG-paper shape, not the agentic-loop shape; that is appropriate for offline batch artefacts.
